methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official Biotechnology thesis-guideline PDF, an orientation module page, and PIAO planning PDFs.

methodsAttempted.notes: Results were dominated by AIR repository research publications; these were not used as policy evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uniud.it IA generativa studenti esami tesi regolamento
methodsAttempted.notes: Search returned the PIAO 2026 planning PDF and a research-contract PDF; no central public AI policy page was located.
Search again surfaced the Biotechnology thesis-guideline PDF with AI-use and plagiarism language.
Fetched robots.txt. The selected public document URLs were not disallowed; robots disallows query/search/form paths and /it/botsrc.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a course-specific 2026 Biotechnology thesis guideline with a dedicated section on use of generative AI, plus the university PIAO 2026-2028 planning document describing staff training around AI, cybersecurity, NIS2, and GDPR. Searches did not locate a public central university-wide student GenAI policy, approved-tool list, or library AI citation guide on the official domain.

stopConditions: Use only official Universita degli Studi di Udine controlled sources.
Do not generalize Biotechnology course thesis guidance into a university-wide AI policy.
Do not treat orientation talks, research publications, or administrative training plans as binding student AI-use rules.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
Piano Integrato di Attivita e Organizzazione (PIAO) 2026-2028

artifacts.claimText: For the University of Udine Biotechnology bachelor's thesis guideline, generative AI tools are described as usable for limited support such as grammar/spelling correction, technical-term translation, and orienting summaries, not as a substitute for the student's own thesis work.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Course-specific Biotechnology thesis guidance permits limited support uses of generative AI.

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Usi consentiti: supporto alla correzione grammaticale e ortografica del testo gia redatto dallo studente; traduzione di termini tecnici o brani in lingua straniera (da verificare sempre con dizionari specialistici); sintesi orientativa di argomenti complessi, da usare come punto di partenza per la consultazione delle fonti primarie originali.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Allowed uses include grammar and spelling support on text already written by the student, technical translation checked against specialist dictionaries, and orienting summaries as a starting point for primary sources.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 9, Utilizzo di strumenti di intelligenza artificiale, Usi consentiti
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Biotechnology bachelor's thesis guideline says students should not insert automatically generated scientific text into the thesis, replace bibliographic research with AI, or use AI-generated text without critical and personal reworking.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Course-specific Biotechnology thesis guidance prohibits direct AI-generated thesis text and AI substitution for bibliography work.

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Usi non consentiti: generazione automatica di testo scientifico da inserire direttamente nella tesi (introduzione, risultati, discussione, conclusioni); sostituzione della ricerca bibliografica: i riferimenti bibliografici devono provenire da banche dati scientifiche (Scopus, PubMed, Web of Science) e devono essere letti e verificati personalmente dallo studente; utilizzo di testo generato da IA senza adeguata rielaborazione critica e personale.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline lists as not allowed automatic generation of scientific text for direct insertion, replacing bibliographic research, and use of AI-generated text without adequate critical and personal reworking.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 9, Utilizzo di strumenti di intelligenza artificiale, Usi non consentiti
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Biotechnology bachelor's thesis guideline says that if a student used AI tools at any stage of thesis writing, the student is required to explicitly declare the tool, version if available, date, and nature of use in a methodological note.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Course-specific Biotechnology thesis guidance requires explicit declaration of AI-tool use.

citation.citationTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Linee guida e requisiti per la stesura della Tesi di Laurea al termine del tirocinio
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Qualora lo studente abbia utilizzato strumenti di intelligenza artificiale in qualsiasi fase della stesura, e tenuto a dichiararlo esplicitamente in una nota metodologica inserita nella sezione Materiali e metodi o nella Premessa, specificando: lo strumento utilizzato, la versione (se disponibile), la data di utilizzo e la natura dell'utilizzo.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: If a student used AI tools at any stage of writing, the guideline requires an explicit methodological note specifying the tool, version if available, date, and nature of use.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Biotechnology bachelor's thesis guideline says non-compliance with its AI-use indications is treated as comparable to plagiarism and may lead to disciplinary sanctions under the university regulation.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Course-specific Biotechnology thesis guidance links non-compliant AI use to plagiarism-like treatment and possible discipline.

artifacts.claimText: The University of Udine PIAO 2026-2028 provides official source-status evidence that the university planned staff training and process integration around AI, including responsible generative AI in administrative processes, but this source is not a student AI-use policy.
artifacts.normalizedValue: PIAO 2026-2028 is official AI-related administrative training context, not student AI policy.

artifacts.title: Universita degli Studi di Udine AI Policy Source Candidates
artifacts.summary: Official-source crawl found a 2026 Biotechnology bachelor's thesis guideline with specific generative-AI use, declaration, and plagiarism-related language. It also found PIAO 2026-2028 staff-training context on responsible generative AI in administrative processes. No central public university-wide GenAI policy, approved-tool list, or library AI citation guide was located in the official-domain searches performed.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Course-specific Biotechnology thesis guidance must not be interpreted as a university-wide policy without further official confirmation.
PIAO administrative training references are source-status context, not direct rules for student assessment or research conduct.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
